instruction: Help me organize the course information into the training brief

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Training Course Outline
Course Name: Digital Transformation in Practice
Duration: 12 hours (completed in 3 days)
Target Audience: Middle and senior management
Training Objective: Understand digital transformation strategy and master implementation methodology
Module 1: Digital Transformation Cognitive Framework (3 hours)
Module 2: Enterprise Digital Assessment and Roadmap (4 hours)
Module 3: Digital Transformation Case Studies (3 hours)
Module 4: Action Plan Development (2 hours)' > /home/user/Desktop/course_outline.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the course information into the training brief

Extract the course name and duration from /home/user/Desktop/course_outline.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/training_brief.txt: 'Course: Digital Transformation in Practice, 12 hours total, for middle and senior management', save

include: Digital Transformation in Practice, 12 hours total
